introSection: Woodstock's Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Dorney Park & Wildwater Kingdom in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA. It is located in the Planet Snoopy area of the park. The attraction opened on May 6, 2000.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and blue supports, used to be brown track and supports.

fullText:
Woodstock's Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Dorney Park & Wildwater Kingdom in Allentown, Pennsylvania, USA. It is located in the Planet Snoopy area of the park. The attraction opened on May 6, 2000.

The ride has a single helix.

Yellow track and blue supports, used to be brown track and supports.
